shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "downshift useCombobox blur relatedTarget null tab switch auto select" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json | sed -n '1,180p'; rg -n \"useCombobox.*getInputProps|test.*getInputProps\" .github scripts package.json 2>/dev/null | head -40"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"export.*tab|const tab|function tab|user =|setup\\(\" src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js src/testUtils.js testUtils.js 2>/dev/null | head -100 && sed -n '240,430p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"tab\\s*=|function tab|tab\\(\" src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks | head -80 && sed -n '1,220p' src/testUtils.js 2>/dev/null"

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In Downshift useCombobox, input blur selection must distinguish browser focus loss from deliberate focus movement: dispatch InputBlur with selectItem false when the blur event's relatedTarget is explicitly null, allowing the reducer to close the menu and clear the highlight without changing selectedItem. Keep selectItem true for non-null relatedTarget so tabbing/clicking to another page element preserves selection behavior.\" -t \"useCombobox blur with null relatedTarget\" --unit-type learning -l \"downshift\" -l \"useCombobox\" -s codex -i 0.7"
